TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tapangʉ, title = Tapangʉ, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tapangʉ} }

S.FORM: alang Tapangʉ ga niya mki sku Kagi Keng atu Arisan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 227 buwan, 642 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 565 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 77 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Cou 83%, Amis 1%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 1%, saySiyat 1%,binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tapangʉ hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Tapangʉ hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tapangʉ hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Tapangʉ hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tapangʉ hya' ga Tfuya. tay 'zil na Tapangʉ hya' ga Lalauya. kayal qmisan lga, hzyaq balay maki' te rgyax hiya'. rekisi kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh tuqi qsya' ki rrhzyal baqun tmnga' kwara' rgryax nya'. 'llaw balay ktan qu qalang myan.

alang Tapangʉ ga niya mki sku Kagi Keng atu Arisan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 227 buwan, 642 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 565 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 77 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Cou 83%, Amis 1%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 1%, saySiyat 1%,binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tapangʉ hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Tapangʉ hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tapangʉ hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Tapangʉ hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tapangʉ hya' ga Tfuya. tay 'zil na Tapangʉ hya' ga Lalauya. kayal qmisan lga, hzyaq balay maki' te rgyax hiya'. rekisi kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh tuqi qsya' ki rrhzyal baqun tmnga' kwara' rgryax nya'. 'llaw balay ktan qu qalang myan.
S.PHON: alaŋ tapaŋ* ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kaɣi keŋ atu aris~ɕan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, ʦ~ʨou **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βunun *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%,βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tapaŋ* ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na tapaŋ* ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tapaŋ* ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na tapaŋ* ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tapaŋ* ħjaʔ ɣa t*uja. taj ʔzil na tapaŋ* ħjaʔ ɣa lalauja. kajal qmis~ɕan lɣa, ħzjaq βalaj makiʔ te rɣjax ħijaʔ. rekis~ɕi kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ tuqi qs~ɕjaʔ ki rrħzjal βaqun tmŋaʔ kwaraʔ rɣrjax njaʔ. ʔllaw βalaj ktan qu qalaŋ mjan.
